title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: autofs bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for autofs is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The autofs utility controls the operation of the automount daemon. The daemon automatically mounts file systems when in use and unmounts them when they are not busy.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): automount blocked when attempting to lookup ldap maps (JIRA:RHEL-111930)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
full_text:
An update for autofs is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The autofs utility controls the operation of the automount daemon. The daemon automatically mounts file systems when in use and unmounts them when they are not busy.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): automount blocked when attempting to lookup ldap maps (JIRA:RHEL-111930)
